trigger: L30 根因修正 — chain exclusion 消除 bet overlap
reason: 正交化解決 overlap (13.4→15 unique), 但個別信號品質不足以通過 permutation test (p=0.2388)

improvement_vs_non_ortho.conclusion: L30 根因正確 — 正交化消除 overlap 後 M2+ 提升 2.4pp，但仍不足以通過 perm test

root_cause_analysis.primary: GapPressure 和 ZoneShift 的個別預測品質不夠強。即使 overlap=0，這兩個信號的選號能力僅略優於 random (edge +1.44%, Z=0.69)。
root_cause_analysis.secondary: Random 3-bet 不重疊 baseline 本身已有 32.56% M2+，要顯著超越需要各注都有強信號，不只是避免 overlap。
root_cause_analysis.lesson: 覆蓋率是必要條件但非充分條件。解決 L30 的 overlap 問題後，瓶頸轉移到個別注的信號品質。

positive_findings.orthogonalization_works: 排除機制確認有效 — 可用於任何未來多注策略
positive_findings.coverage_gain: +2.40pp M2+ 直接來自 overlap 消除，驗證 L30 根因診斷
positive_findings.ortho_vs_old: McNemar chi2=11.02, p=0.0009 — 正交版顯著優於現行 3-bet 策略

future_retest_conditions: Replace GapPressure/ZoneShift with stronger signals (e.g. Fourier-based) as bet2/bet3
Test SumRange + Fourier(excl) + Cold(excl) 3-bet orthogonal structure
Consider adapting 5bet_fourier4_cold's first 3 bets as 3-bet strategy
Add signal quality pre-check: each bet must individually have positive edge before combining
old_strategy_status: STILL UNVERIFIED — SumRange+Bayesian+ZoneBalance shows -1.78% to -4.44% edge. Both old and orthogonal fail permutation test.
